outfit_info.outfit_description: This outfit presents a blend of relaxed comfort and classic sophistication. A light blue denim shirt is layered under a cream cable-knit cardigan, paired with pleated wide-leg corduroy pants. A black belt cinches the waist, complemented by dark brown loafers and a matching leather tote bag, creating a warm, polished, and effortlessly stylish look.

model_attributes.body: The model has a slender physique and presents a poised, natural stance.
model_attributes.pose: Standing front-facing, one hand subtly resting by her side, holding the bag, conveying an understated elegance.
model_attributes.background: A minimalist, solid white studio background ensures the focus remains entirely on the outfit and model.

outfit.P01112310: white cable-knit wool and cashmere cardigan
